For COPD and bronchiectasis, beneficiaries must have at least one inpatient, SNF, or home health 
claim, or two-Part B (institutional or non-institutional) claims with a COPD code in any position during 
the one-year reference period. When two claims are required, they must occur at least one day apart. 

The CCW’s criteria were developed after reviewing validated algorithms from the research literature 
and criteria used by other federal data sources. You can find more detailed
